hero_title: Draft, Post & Reverse — your ledger just got safer
hero_subtitle: Every sale, purchase, payment, receipt and journal entry can now be held as a draft, posted deliberately, and reversed cleanly with a full audit trail — no more editing history or deleting mistakes.
flow_title: The new lifecycle of every transaction
flow_subtitle: One consistent flow now applies across Sales, Purchases, Receipts, Payments, Journal Entries, Account Transfers, Expenses, Drawings and Item Transfers.
flow_step1_desc: Save a document without touching the ledger or stock. Stock is reserved, not deducted, so nothing is committed yet.
flow_step2_desc: Review, then post with one click. The ledger is updated, stock moves for real, and the document becomes locked.
flow_step3_desc: Made a mistake on a posted document? Reverse it with a required reason. A mirrored entry is created — nothing is edited or deleted.
before_1: Posted documents could be edited or deleted directly, leaving no trace of what changed.
after_1: Only Draft documents are editable. Posted and Reversed documents are permanently locked.
before_2: Correcting a mistake meant editing the original record or manually creating an offsetting entry.
after_2: One "Reverse" button creates an exact mirrored entry (debit ⇄ credit) linked back to the original.
before_3: No visibility into who approved or reversed a transaction, or why.
after_3: Every document tracks posted_at / posted_by and reversed_at / reversal reason automatically.
before_4: Stock adjustments during edits could drift from the accounting entries.
after_4: Reversing a document automatically reverses its stock movements too, keeping inventory and books in sync.
feature1_desc: A reversal can't be submitted without typing why — every correction is self-documenting.
feature2_desc: Draft, Posted, Reversed, Cancelled and Voided are now distinct, at-a-glance badges across every list and detail page.
feature3_desc: Reversing a sale or purchase automatically voids and re-posts the linked stock movements — no manual stock fixes needed.
feature4_desc: Every Show page now links a document to its reversal (or the original it reversed), so history is always one click away.
modules_subtitle: Look for the Post and Reverse buttons on the detail page of:
footer_note: Questions about the new flow? Reach out to your NextBook administrator or check the in-app help on any of these pages.
